title: Verify LAN, DNS, time, and node connectivity
intent: Provide automated admin-network checks and explicit manual evidence requirements for DHCP, firewall, switch topology, DNS, NTP, K3s API, and Flannel VXLAN before startup.
proof_hooks: git diff --check; nix flake check --no-build --no-update-lock-file; nix develop --accept-flake-config -c ./scripts/validate-repo.sh; decapod validate
deferred_questions: Do not mark the LAN ready until actual addresses/reservations, DNS answers, firewall rules, UDP 8472 node paths, switch topology, and NTP evidence are recorded.
